title: Vaucluse Apartment Kitchen Re-model
summary: Apartment kitchen remodel in Vaucluse with custom cabinetry shaped around the constraints of the existing footprint.
heroAlt: Vaucluse apartment kitchen remodel with timber cabinetry and green splashback
overview: This Vaucluse kitchen remodel shows how careful joinery planning can improve a tighter apartment shell without forcing the room beyond what the footprint can comfortably hold. The cabinetry and layout decisions were about making the kitchen feel cleaner, lighter and more usable.
materials: Joinery fitted to an existing Vaucluse footprint

afterImages.alt: Finished Vaucluse kitchen remodel with green splashback and timber cabinetry
afterImages.caption: Completed Vaucluse kitchen remodel with timber-look cabinetry, marble benchtop and green splashback.

afterImages.caption: Entry view into the completed Vaucluse kitchen, showing the island and appliance wall.

afterImages.caption: In-progress angle showing the island and cabinet layout in Vaucluse.

afterImages.caption: Longer galley view from the Vaucluse kitchen showing the skylight, white cabinetry and timber-look joinery.

beforeImages.alt: Vaucluse kitchen during renovation and cabinetry installation
beforeImages.caption: Renovation stage from the Vaucluse kitchen showing cabinetry installation in progress.

spaces.title: Kitchen remodel
spaces.text: A Vaucluse apartment kitchen remodel where cabinetry and layout needed to work within a tighter existing shell.

outcome: The finished kitchen feels more resolved and better balanced, with the joinery doing more practical work while still keeping the apartment finish restrained.
ctaText: Planning a Vaucluse kitchen remodel or joinery upgrade? Send through the current layout and we can help shape the next step.
